title: Replacement Evaporator Fan Motor for Refrigerator, DA31-00287B Freezer Cooling Fan Motor, # Replacing DA31-00334C, DA31-00334A, DA96-00968A, AP6803162, AP5948644, EAP9494284
features: Deal with Problems: Consider replacing the refrigerator fan motor if the refrigerator has the problems of high temperature, insufficient cooling, abnormal noise, no cooling at all and downtime problems due to aging or damaged cooling fan
Stable Performance: Accelerates the cooling speed and optimizes the cooling cycle. The evaporator fan motor effectively reduces the internal temperature and keeps food fresher longer
Replacement Part: The refrigerator evaporator fan motor' s model number is DA31-00287B, can replace with DA31-00334C, DA31-00334A, DA96-00968A, AP6803162, 3954921, AP5948644, PS9494284 and EAP9494284

Compatible Models: Compatible with refrigerator models of F23J9011SR, RS25H5111SR, RS25J500DSR, RF220NCTASR, RS25H5111SG, RF34H9960S4, RF28K9380SG, RF34H9950S4, RF32FMQDBSR, RH25H5611SG, RF28K9580SG, RF22K9381SR, RH25H5611BC, RF28T5001SR, RF220NCTABC, etc.
Specification: DC 12V, 2.5W, 0.12A, 1870rpm. Overall size: 6.2*3.9*3.7in, wire length 30in
description: Feature: Specification: DA31-00287B refrigerator evaporator fan motor, DC 12V, 2.5W, 0.12A, 1870RPM.Overall size: 6.2*3.9*3.7in, wire length 30in.OEM replacement part for refrigerator evaporator fan motor. Easy to install, time and money saving. Replace Part Number: This refrigerator evaporator fan motor part number is DA31-00287B, which can directly replace DA31-00334C, DA31-00334A, DA96-00968A, AP6803162, 3954921, AP5948644, PS9494284, EAP9494284, etc. Fault Repair: Consider replacing the refrigerator fan motor if the refrigerator has the following problems: high refrigerator temperature, insufficient cooling, abnormal noise, no cooling at all and other disturbances, as well as downtime problems due to aging or damage of the fan. Specification: Name: Refrigerator Evaporator Fan Motor Number: DA31-00287B Size: As Shown Wire Length: 30in Voltage: DC 12V Current: 0.12A Compatible Models: Sam-sung refrigerators models of RF23J9011SR, RS25H5111SR, RS25J500DSR, RF220NCTASR, RS25H5111SG, RF34H9960S4, RF28K9380SG, RF34H9950S4, RF32FMQDBSR, RH25H5611SG, RF28K9580SG, RF22K9381SR, RH25H5611BC, RF28T5001SR, RF220NCTABC, and others. Package Included: 1 * Refrigerator Evaporator Fan Motor
